body.title: Igor habit: SSH pull configured Ollama models to all online swarm machines
body.result: run_swarm_model_sync tool fixed in cluster_ssh.py — removed two broken Igor-generated duplicates (cortex.tool + bad imports), replaced with clean implementation using _load_machines() + _ssh_exec() + registry.register(). 1868 tests pass.
body.description: Create run_swarm_model_sync() tool + PROC_SWARM_MODEL_SYNC habit (nightly, schedule_interval_sec=86400). For each online machine in machines DB: SSH to it, run 'ollama pull <ollama_model>' and if ollama_model_batch set, also pull that. Use existing ssh_exec tool. Log results to ring category=swarm_model_sync. Igor owns this — no human needed to keep models in sync across the cluster.
